title: Use "Arrays.stream" for Primitive Arrays
description: For primitive arrays, it's recommended to use "Arrays.stream" as it uses the appropriate primitive stream type (IntStream, LongStream, DoubleStream) when applicable, leading to much better performance than using Arrays.asList. This helps to avoid the unnecessary construction of a list of boxed types.
recommendation: Replace Arrays.asList with Arrays.stream for primitive arrays.
impact: Improves application's performance by eliminating unnecessary object creation and boxing of primitives.
